title: Implement user authentication flow with JWT
description: Add login, logout, and token refresh endpoints. Include password hashing with bcrypt and secure cookie handling for refresh tokens.

title: Set up CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
description: Configure automated testing, linting, and deployment to staging environment on every push to main branch.

title: Design and implement REST API documentation
description: Create OpenAPI/Swagger documentation for all endpoints with request/response examples and authentication details.

title: Refactor legacy payment processing module
description: Modernize the payment flow to support multiple providers and improve error handling for failed transactions.

title: Add unit tests for user service layer
description: Achieve 80% code coverage for user CRUD operations, validation logic, and edge cases.

title: Implement dark mode toggle in settings
description: Add theme switcher with persistence using localStorage. Ensure all components support both themes.

title: Optimize database queries for dashboard analytics
description: Add proper indexes and rewrite slow queries. Target sub-200ms response time for analytics endpoints.

title: Create onboarding flow for new users
description: Build step-by-step wizard with progress indicator. Include profile setup, preferences, and first action guidance.

title: Implement rate limiting for API endpoints
description: Add Redis-based rate limiting to prevent abuse. Configure different limits for authenticated vs anonymous users.

title: Fix memory leak in WebSocket connection handler
description: Investigate and resolve connection cleanup when clients disconnect unexpectedly.

title: Add email verification for new registrations
description: Send verification link on signup. Block access to protected features until email is verified.

title: Build admin dashboard for user management
description: Create interface to view, search, filter, and moderate user accounts. Include bulk actions.

title: Implement file upload with S3 integration
description: Support multipart uploads for large files. Add progress tracking and virus scanning integration.

title: Add comprehensive error logging and monitoring
description: Integrate Sentry or similar. Add structured logging with request context and user IDs.

title: Implement search with Elasticsearch
description: Full-text search across products and content. Support filters, facets, and relevance tuning.

title: Add two-factor authentication (2FA)
description: Support TOTP-based 2FA with QR code setup. Include backup codes for account recovery.

title: Migrate from JavaScript to TypeScript
description: Convert remaining JS files to TS. Fix type errors and add strict mode. Update build config.

title: Implement real-time notifications
description: Push notifications via WebSocket when new messages or updates arrive. Add notification preferences.

title: Create mobile-responsive layout for main app
description: Ensure all pages work on mobile. Add touch-friendly controls and responsive tables.

title: Set up database backup and recovery procedures
description: Automated daily backups. Document restore process and test recovery drill.

title: Add export to PDF for reports
description: Generate formatted PDF reports from dashboard data. Support custom date ranges.

title: Implement OAuth login with Google and GitHub
description: Add social login options. Handle account linking for existing users.

title: Fix accessibility issues (WCAG 2.1 AA)
description: Audit and fix keyboard navigation, screen reader support, color contrast, and focus indicators.

title: Add pagination to large data tables
description: Implement cursor-based pagination for API. Add infinite scroll or page controls in UI.

title: Create API versioning strategy
description: Implement /v1/ prefix. Document deprecation policy. Add version header support.

title: Implement audit logging for sensitive operations
description: Log all admin actions, payment changes, and permission updates with user and timestamp.

title: Add data validation with Zod schemas
description: Replace manual validation with Zod. Add runtime type checking at API boundaries.

title: Optimize bundle size and lazy loading
description: Code split by route. Lazy load heavy components. Target initial load under 200KB gzipped.

title: Implement soft delete for user data
description: Mark records as deleted instead of removing. Add retention policy and purge job.

title: Add keyboard shortcuts for power users
description: Implement global shortcuts for common actions. Add shortcut help modal.

title: Set up staging environment with seed data
description: Create staging deployment. Add script to populate with anonymized production-like data.

title: Add bulk import from CSV
description: Support CSV upload for users/products. Validate and show preview before import.

title: Implement webhook system for integrations
description: Allow external systems to subscribe to events. Add retry logic and signature verification.

title: Create component library documentation
description: Storybook with all components. Add usage examples and prop documentation.

title: Implement caching layer with Redis
description: Cache frequently accessed data. Add cache invalidation on updates. Set TTLs appropriately.

title: Add session management and device list
description: Show active sessions. Allow users to revoke sessions. Notify on new device login.

title: Fix timezone handling across the application
description: Store all timestamps in UTC. Display in user's timezone. Fix date picker inconsistencies.

title: Implement feature flags system
description: Add ability to toggle features per environment or user segment. Integrate with config service.

title: Add E2E tests for critical user flows
description: Checkout flow, login, password reset. Run in CI on every PR.

title: Implement draft and auto-save for forms
description: Save form state to localStorage. Restore on return. Add unsaved changes warning.

title: Add request/response logging middleware
description: Log request IDs, duration, status. Exclude sensitive fields. Integrate with log aggregation.

title: Implement password strength indicator
description: Real-time feedback on password strength. Enforce minimum requirements on signup.

title: Create health check endpoint for load balancer
description: Return 200 if DB and Redis are reachable. Include version and uptime.

title: Add image optimization and CDN delivery
description: Resize and compress images on upload. Serve via CDN with proper cache headers.

title: Implement forgot password flow
description: Send reset link via email. Token expiry 1 hour. Invalidate on use.

title: Add loading skeletons for async content
description: Replace spinners with skeleton placeholders. Improve perceived performance.

title: Implement role-based access control (RBAC)
description: Define roles and permissions. Middleware to check access. Admin UI for assignment.

title: Add confirmation dialogs for destructive actions
description: Delete, archive, revoke. Require explicit confirmation. Add undo for recent actions.

title: Set up error boundary and fallback UI
description: Catch React errors. Show friendly message. Report to monitoring.

title: Implement API request retry with exponential backoff
description: Retry failed requests. Configurable max attempts. Don't retry on 4xx.

title: Add user profile editing
description: Edit name, avatar, preferences. Validate and sanitize input. Handle avatar upload.

title: Create database migration for new schema
description: Add new columns. Backfill data. Update indexes. Test rollback.

title: Implement infinite scroll for feed
description: Load more on scroll. Virtualize list for performance. Handle empty states.

title: Add API rate limit headers in response
description: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset in response headers.

title: Implement email templates with variables
description: Create reusable templates. Support variables. Preview in admin.

title: Add breadcrumb navigation
description: Show current location in hierarchy. Make clickable for navigation.

title: Implement duplicate detection for records
description: Check for duplicates on create. Suggest merge for similar records.

title: Add copy-to-clipboard for IDs and tokens
description: One-click copy with feedback. Handle clipboard API fallback.

title: Create database connection pooling config
description: Tune pool size. Add connection timeout. Monitor pool usage.

title: Implement scheduled jobs with cron
description: Daily cleanup, weekly reports. Use job queue. Add monitoring.

title: Add tooltip and help text for form fields
description: Explain complex fields. Link to docs. Improve form completion rate.

title: Implement CORS configuration
description: Allow specific origins. Handle preflight. Configure for dev and prod.

title: Add empty state illustrations
description: Friendly illustrations when no data. Include call-to-action.

title: Implement request validation middleware
description: Validate body, params, query. Return 400 with clear error messages.

title: Add print stylesheet for reports
description: Optimize layout for printing. Hide navigation. Include page breaks.

title: Create database indexes for common queries
description: Analyze slow queries. Add composite indexes. Document index strategy.

title: Implement graceful shutdown
description: Handle SIGTERM. Drain connections. Complete in-flight requests.

title: Add focus trap in modal dialogs
description: Keep focus inside modal. Return focus on close. Support Escape key.

title: Implement idempotency for payment API
description: Accept idempotency key. Return same result for duplicate requests.

title: Add success and error toast notifications
description: Show feedback for actions. Auto-dismiss. Support action buttons.

title: Create runbook for production incidents
description: Document common issues and resolution steps. Include escalation path.

title: Add debounce to search input
description: Reduce API calls on typing. Configurable delay. Cancel pending on new input.

title: Implement content security policy headers
description: Configure CSP. Test with existing resources. Report violations.

title: Implement database transaction for multi-step operations
description: Wrap related inserts/updates in transaction. Handle rollback on error.

title: Add progress indicator for multi-step forms
description: Show steps completed. Allow navigation between steps. Validate before advance.

title: Create API client with TypeScript types
description: Generate types from OpenAPI. Add retry and error handling.

title: Implement cookie consent banner
description: GDPR compliant. Store preference. Block non-essential cookies until consent.

title: Add performance monitoring for frontend
description: Track LCP, FID, CLS. Send to analytics. Create performance dashboard.

title: Implement batch update API
description: Accept array of updates. Process in transaction. Return individual results.

title: Add collapsible sections in settings
description: Group related settings. Remember expanded state. Improve scanability.

title: Create database backup verification job
description: Weekly job to verify backup integrity. Alert on failure.

title: Implement request correlation IDs
description: Generate ID per request. Pass through all logs. Include in error reports.

title: Add drag-and-drop for list reordering
description: Reorder items in list. Persist order. Provide keyboard alternative.

title: Implement API deprecation warnings
description: Add Deprecation header. Log usage of deprecated endpoints. Document migration path.

title: Add unit tests for utility functions
description: Test date formatting, validation helpers, string utils. Aim for 100% coverage.

title: Create environment-specific config validation
description: Validate required env vars on startup. Fail fast with clear message.

title: Implement optimistic UI updates
description: Update UI before server response. Rollback on error. Show loading state.

title: Implement connection pooling for external APIs
description: Reuse HTTP connections. Configure timeouts. Add circuit breaker.

title: Add API documentation for webhooks
description: Document payload format, retry policy, signature verification.

title: Add keyboard navigation for data grid
description: Arrow keys, Enter to select, Space to toggle. Follow ARIA grid pattern.

title: Create database query performance dashboard
description: Track slow queries. Show execution plans. Alert on degradation.

title: Implement configurable date range picker
description: Preset ranges (last 7 days, etc). Custom range. Validate min/max.

title: Add integration tests for API endpoints
description: Test happy path and error cases. Use test database. Run in CI.

title: Implement server-side rendering for SEO
description: SSR for public pages. Meta tags. Structured data.

title: Add bulk delete with confirmation
description: Select multiple items. Show count. Confirm before delete. Undo option.

title: Create migration rollback script
description: Document rollback steps. Test rollback. Add to runbook.

title: Implement request timeout configuration
description: Configurable timeouts per endpoint type. Cancel on timeout. Log slow requests.

title: Add table column visibility toggle
description: Let users show/hide columns. Persist preference. Responsive defaults.

title: Implement audit trail for data changes
description: Track who changed what and when. Queryable history. Support rollback.

title: Add skeleton loading for table rows
description: Match column layout. Animate. Switch to content when loaded.

title: Create load testing suite
description: Simulate concurrent users. Identify bottlenecks. Establish baselines.

title: Implement API response compression
description: Enable gzip/brotli. Configure for large responses. Monitor size reduction.

title: Add filter persistence in URL
description: Encode filters in query params. Restore on load. Shareable URLs.

title: Add export to Excel functionality
description: Export filtered data to XLSX. Include formatting. Handle large datasets.

title: Implement database read replicas
description: Route read queries to replicas. Handle replication lag. Fallback to primary.

title: Create developer onboarding guide
description: Setup instructions, architecture overview, coding standards, how to run tests.

title: Implement sticky table headers on scroll
description: Keep header visible when scrolling long tables. Handle horizontal scroll.

title: Add API usage analytics
description: Track endpoint usage by client. Identify popular and unused endpoints.

title: Implement feature toggle in admin panel
description: UI to enable/disable features. Per environment. Audit log of changes.

title: Add CSV export with proper escaping
description: Handle commas, quotes, newlines in data. Support BOM for Excel.

title: Create database connection health check
description: Periodic ping to DB. Alert on connection pool exhaustion.

title: Implement table column sorting
description: Sort by column. Toggle asc/desc. Persist sort preference. Handle nulls.

title: Add inline editing for table cells
description: Click to edit. Validate on blur. Save to API. Handle conflicts.

title: Implement user authentication flow with JWT
description: Add login, logout, and token refresh endpoints. Include password hashing with bcrypt and secure cookie handling for refresh tokens.
